headline: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Monday
summary: Oil prices are surging again after the U.S. and Iran's talks were unsuccessful. Goldman shares dropped on earnings.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Upgrades Masco to Outperform, Maintains Price Target to $78
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Stephen Kim   upgrades Masco (NYSE:MAS) from In-Line to Outperform and maintains the price target from $78 to $78.
